hero.description: Launch transparent blockchain-based voting for your school, club, team, or organization. Fast setup, tamper-resistant results, and real-time participation.

items.title: Blockchain-backed voting
items.desc: Strengthen trust through transparent and verifiable election records.

items.title: Support multiple positions
items.desc: Create structured elections with different roles and candidate groups.

items.title: Monitor results clearly
items.desc: Follow election progress and outcome in a simple, organized interface.

features.title: Why choose ElectionPoll?
features.subtitle: Built for trust, speed, and a better voting experience.

items.title: Blockchain Security
items.desc: Votes are recorded transparently and protected against tampering.

items.title: Fast Setup
items.desc: Create elections in minutes with support for multiple positions.

items.title: Live Results
items.desc: Track participation and voting distribution in a clean dashboard.

items.title: Flexible Voting
items.desc: Support both single-choice and multiple-choice voting formats.

demo.title: Real-Time Voting Demo
demo.subtitle: See how ElectionPoll helps you run transparent, user-friendly online elections with instant result updates.
demo.pollDesc: A simple election simulation powered by ElectionPoll.
demo.makeChoice: Please select one candidate to cast your vote:
demo.resultDesc: The data below is only for demonstration purposes of the results interface.
demo.whyDesc: The system is designed for academic elections, internal organization voting, and community polls.
demo.feature1Desc: Participants can cast votes quickly with a simple and intuitive interface.
demo.feature2Desc: Track vote counts and percentages instantly as results update.
demo.feature3Desc: Make election processes clearer, more modern, and easier to verify.
demo.feature4Desc: Works well for classes, clubs, departments, or larger organizations.
demo.noteDesc: In the real system, you can customize positions, candidates, election time, and voting rules.
demo.selectWarning: Please choose a candidate before voting.

guide.title: How to Use ElectionPoll
guide.subtitle: In just a few simple steps, you can create, launch, and monitor a complete online election.
guide.step1Desc: Enter the title, description, start/end time, and configure how many options voters can choose.
guide.step2Desc: Define the positions to be elected and assign candidates to each position.
guide.step3Desc: Once voting starts, you can monitor statistics, charts, and aggregated results in real time.
guide.leftTitle: Tips for building a better election
guide.leftDesc: A good election is not only about design — it also needs a clear structure and an easy-to-understand flow.
guide.tip2Desc: Explain the purpose, timeline, and voting rules clearly.
guide.tip3Desc: Include full name, avatar, short bio, and the position they are running for.
guide.ctaDesc: Start now with ElectionPoll to digitize your election process in a professional and intuitive way.

steps.title: How it works
steps.subtitle: A simple workflow for launching and managing digital elections.

items.title: Create your election
items.desc: Set up positions, candidates, timelines, and voting rules in just a few steps.

items.title: Share with voters
items.desc: Invite participants to securely connect and cast their votes online.

items.title: Track results transparently
items.desc: Monitor election activity and view final results with confidence.

useCases.title: Built for real-world voting scenarios
useCases.subtitle: Flexible enough for student groups, organizations, and community decisions.

items.title: Student Organizations
items.desc: Run leadership and representative elections for schools, faculties, or clubs.

items.title: Campus & Club Voting
items.desc: Use for internal polls, event selections, team decisions, and community voting.

items.title: Trusted Governance
items.desc: Improve transparency and accountability in organizational decision-making.

cta.title: Ready to launch your next election?
